title: instance.state Facet
description: Demanded by the awsec2 Syncer Contract (charter §1.1; ADR-0095). The lifecycle state of a cloud instance Entity — emitted by normalizeInstance, validated at the Projector write path. Lifecycle Actions (start/stop/reboot/terminate) drive real transitions the next Syncer poll reflects here.

state.description: provider lifecycle state (e.g. pending, running, stopping, stopped, shutting-down)
